dependency_installation_method: none required beyond stdlib; pip freeze recorded for empty venv
important_runtime_assumptions: Phase-1 validation uses repo-local ffmpeg/ffprobe binaries because PATH does not provide them.
Host python3.13 is sufficient because the wrapper only uses the standard library.
ffprobe fallback binary is x86_64 on an arm64 host and runs under host compatibility support.

phase1: if missing, use repo-local fallback executables recorded in backend_choice.json
repro: use the exact bundle-local executable paths from repro_manifest.json
do not re-discover or replace binaries unless a documented fallback is triggered
